entries.title: ADR-001: Conservative, Fail-Safe Account Safety
verified_against: spec IA sprint 1 fix-up (2026-07-13): recast as rationale-only ADR; binding invariants restored to the account-safety technical contract
entries.notes: Supporting rationale ADR for the conservative fail-safe account-safety posture: alternatives considered (rotation, auto-clear, parallelism, solving/evasion, instant retries), trade-offs, consequences. The binding invariants themselves live in the account-safety technical contract (crawler-account-safety-spec §2/§7).

entries.title: Account Safety — Review Checklist
verified_against: spec IA sprint 1 (2026-07-13): content-preserving extraction from crawler-account-safety-spec §10
entries.notes: Nine-item safety checklist applied to every PR-C* runtime PR (speed, concurrency, checkpoint behavior, bypass/evasion, lease, data-plane, text leakage, pure-policy testability, Sonar/CodeRabbit hygiene).

entries.title: Account Safety — Technical Contract
verified_against: session.StateMachine + CheckpointManager own browser-session checkpoint lifecycle (NO_AUTOMATED_CAPTCHA_BYPASS)
existing checkpoint/login classifiers: proof.js:87, facebook-state.js:50, outbox.js:228
org_crawl_intents mid-migration to platform postgres 0108 (data-plane doctrine)
entries.notes: PR-C0.5 docs-only architecture baseline for Facebook crawler multi-account safety (Account Safety Coordinator, account-runtime state machine, concurrency/risk-budget policy, telemetry contract, data-plane ownership). Companion to crawl-speed-checkpoint-audit. Not anti-detection. No runtime change. Split 2026-07-13 (spec IA sprint 1): review checklist extracted to runbooks/review-checklist.md; binding invariants (hard boundaries, data-plane ownership) remain in this technical contract, with supporting rationale in decisions/ADR-001-conservative-account-safety.md.

entries.title: Facebook Automation Reliability Track
entries.notes: Reviewed in PR24C; moved under account-safety/implementation/ in the spec IA mega sprint (2026-07-21) — its foundational invariant (verified initiator/account/connector/identity/eligibility, no silent fallback) is the account-safety surface, though its PR train spans crawl/comment/inbox. PR-A (mission preflight, reject account_id=0, no silent account fallback) shipped. PR-B..PR-F remain future-facing -> partial.
